items.title: Where Are the Passengers of the Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Now?
items.summary: Nearly two dozen countries were moving to repatriate their citizens who were aboard the cruise ship where three passengers died in a hantavirus outbreak.

items.title: Barcelona fans celebrate winning La Liga title in El Clasico
items.summary: Barcelona's inner city turned into a huge street party after the club beat Real Madrid to win their 29th league title.
